P2_compensated_D_eq_r_Coulomb.z_infty: e^{phi_inf - phi_obs} finite if phi_inf finite
P2_compensated_D_eq_r_Coulomb.barrier: FAIL — open infinite reach, finite asymptotic redshift offset only
P2_compensated_D_eq_r_Coulomb.center_issue: q!=0 singular at r=0 if chart includes origin — relational ok if observer off singular point

P0_compensated_free_D.case_E_gt_0: D ~ sqrt(E) r at large r => phi'~G/(E r^2) => phi->const; proper DIVERGES; barrier FAIL
P0_compensated_free_D.case_E_eq_0: D' = ± (sqrt(Z)/2) |G|/D => D^2 ~ ± sqrt(Z)|G| r + const; still D->oo; phi'~1/r; need check
P0_compensated_free_D.case_E_eq_0_phi: phi' = G/D^2 ~ 1/r => phi ~ ln r -> ±oo slowly; proper int e^phi ~ int r^{±1}
P0_compensated_free_D.case_E_lt_0: D bounded max; TURN then FALL — finite chart life, not large-r open exterior
P0_compensated_free_D.barrier_open_exterior: FAIL for E>0 (generic open); E=0 log borderline — score separately
P0_compensated_free_D.E_eq_0_detail: If G>0, D^2 = D0^2 + sqrt(Z) G r (taking +), phi' = G/D^2 > 0, phi increases as (1/2)ln(r) asympt; e^phi ~ r^{1/2}; int e^phi dr DIVERGES; int e^{2phi} dr DIVERGES; z->oo but infinite proper reach — WEAK/OPEN not hard barrier

P3_uncompensated_D_eq_r.no_finite_const_asymp: phi->const implies (r^2 phi')'-> 4 e^{-2c}/Z >0 => phi'~ (const)/r after integrate once? actually integrate: r^2 phi' = (4/Z) int e^{-2phi} r^2? no int of RHS is int 4e^{-2phi} dr not r^2
P3_uncompensated_D_eq_r.note: Integrate: Z r^2 phi' = 4 int_0^r e^{-2phi(s)} ds + A. For regular origin A=0 often.
P3_uncompensated_D_eq_r.if_phi_monotone_down: phi-> -oo possible; then e^{-2phi}->+oo sources more phi growth of |phi'| — runaway candidate
P3_uncompensated_D_eq_r.barrier: OPEN — needs explicit solution class; historical Branch-P frozen-D often finite-domain / no asymptotic vacuum (scoped)
P3_uncompensated_D_eq_r.relational: frozen D=r prefers polar origin structure — macro use must stay observer-chart only

P1_uncompensated_free_D_known_classes.explore_soft_phi_decreasing: phi ~ -|b| r, D->Dinf: PROPER reach FINITE (int e^phi converges) but OUTWARD is DECREASING phi => blueshift outward, not cosmological redshift. Macro FAIL for 'look out, redder'
P1_uncompensated_free_D_known_classes.explore_hard_phi_increasing: phi rises, D pinches finite r: redshift outward but end is geometric pinch not large-r asymptote; preferred-bulge smell for cosmos
P1_uncompensated_free_D_known_classes.barrier_proper: soft class has finite proper distance to chart infinity — geometric 'end' but wrong redshift direction for macro look-out
P1_uncompensated_free_D_known_classes.macro_score: FAIL as observer looking out to redder edge (sign); hard FAIL as preferred pinch-center story

sign_convention.redshift_static: 1+z = e^{phi_src - phi_obs}  (source deeper in phi => redshifted)
sign_convention.macro_look_out: need phi increasing with reach for cosmological-type redshift

relational.requirement: macro law must allow any event as observer origin with same structural form
relational.P2_coulomb: scale-free 1/r about a charge center — singular center; shell theorem / frame-relation needed for multi-observer (banked elsewhere); not a dilation barrier at large r
relational.P1_throat: special bulge — fails no-preferred-center as ontology
relational.needed: translationally / relationally democratic asymptotics (harder) — first filter is single-chart large-r barrier + correct redshift direction

SCOREBOARD.P0_E_eq_0: WEAK — z may ->oo as log but infinite proper/null reach
SCOREBOARD.P3_frozen_D_W1: OPEN (no closed large-r vacuum; finite-domain scoped history)
SCOREBOARD.P1_soft_explore: proper barrier YES but blueshift outward FAIL macro look-out
SCOREBOARD.P1_hard_explore: redshift+pinch; not large-r; preferred structure FAIL cosmos
SCOREBOARD.headline: No vacuum packaging on the native skeleton yet PASSES full elegant macro test (redshift-out + dilation barrier + open large-r + no preferred center). Live gaps: P3 asymptotics; whether free-D + matter (derived only) can give phi increasing + convergent reach without inventing terms.
